name: Antipasto Salad II
recipeIngredient: 4 green onions, cut in half, lengthwise
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine mushrooms, artichoke hearts, olive oil, vinegar, wine, basil, oregano, salt, and pepper.
2. Toss the mixture until well combined. Set aside and let marinate at room temperature for 30 minutes.
3. Arrange chopped lettuce on a large platter.
4. Strain the mushrooms and artichokes from the marinade and place in the center of the lettuce.
5. Arrange the remaining vegetables around the center.
6. Drizzle the remaining marinade over the antipasto and serve.
